description.en: A polished first-time China route that introduces iconic landmarks, major city contrast, and a comfortable private travel rhythm.
description.zh: 一条适合首次来华游客的高完成度线路，兼顾代表性地标、城市对比感与舒适的私享旅行节奏。

tagline.en: A smooth and high-recognition introduction to China for first-time visitors.
tagline.zh: 适合首次来华游客的高识别度中国入门线路。

idealFor.en: First-time visitors, couples, families, and guests who want a classic China introduction.
idealFor.zh: 首次来华游客、情侣、家庭以及想快速建立中国整体印象的客群。

travelStyle.en: Classic landmarks, polished pacing, and private multi-city comfort.
travelStyle.zh: 经典地标、节奏顺滑、多城市私享舒适体验。

howToUse.en: Use this as the safest entry-level China itinerary for clients who are new to the destination.
howToUse.zh: 可作为面对新客时最稳妥的中国入门型线路模板。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are usually the easiest seasons for a balanced city-based route.
bestTime.zh: 春秋通常最适合这种以城市为主、节奏均衡的线路。

extensions.en: Can be extended with Xi'an, Chengdu, or Guilin depending on time and interests.
extensions.zh: 可根据时间和兴趣延展到西安、成都或桂林。

highlights.en: Strong fit for first-time China guests
highlights.zh: 非常适合首次来华客群

highlights.en: Easy-to-sell route with major landmark recognition
highlights.zh: 识别度高，容易成交

highlights.en: Comfortable private rhythm without overloading the trip
highlights.zh: 私享节奏舒适，不容易过载

description.en: Begin with a relaxed arrival and an easy orientation to the destination.
description.zh: 以轻松抵达和城市认知作为开场。

description.en: Focus on the most recognizable highlights to quickly establish the trip’s identity.
description.zh: 围绕最具代表性的地标展开，快速建立行程识别度。

description.en: Add a more local and human layer beyond big landmarks.
description.zh: 在大地标之外，补充更本地、更有生活感的一面。

description.en: Move smoothly into the next city while keeping the pace comfortable.
description.zh: 在保持舒适节奏的前提下转场到下一座城市。

description.en: Show a more contemporary side of China through skyline, lifestyle, and urban energy.
description.zh: 通过天际线、生活方式与城市活力呈现更现代的一面。

description.en: Leave room for private pacing, shopping, or special requests.
description.zh: 留出私享节奏、购物或个性化安排空间。

description.en: Wrap up the route and transfer out smoothly.
description.zh: 完成整段行程并顺利送机或送站。

description.en: A highly recognizable route linking Beijing, Xi'an, and Shanghai for travelers who want a broad but manageable introduction to China.
description.zh: 串联北京、西安、上海的高识别度路线，适合想用可控时间快速认识中国的旅行者。

tagline.en: Three iconic stops, one clear first-time China story.
tagline.zh: 三座代表性城市，串成一条清晰的中国初游故事线。

idealFor.en: First-time visitors, educational travelers, and guests who want the safest classic route.
idealFor.zh: 首次来华游客、研学型客群与偏好经典稳妥路线的客人。

travelStyle.en: Heritage + modern cities + classic first-time route logic.
travelStyle.zh: 古都文化 + 现代都市 + 经典首次来华逻辑。

howToUse.en: Use it as the most universally understandable China route for international guests.
howToUse.zh: 可作为最容易被国际客人理解与接受的中国标准线路。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are generally the best match for this route.
bestTime.zh: 春秋通常是这条线路最稳的季节。

extensions.en: Can extend to Chengdu or Guilin if clients want food or scenery.
extensions.zh: 如客户想加美食或风景，可延展到成都或桂林。

highlights.en: Strong mix of imperial history and modern skyline
highlights.zh: 帝国历史与现代天际线结合强

highlights.en: Easy for overseas guests to understand and compare
highlights.zh: 非常适合海外客快速理解中国

highlights.en: A safe high-conversion route for travel sales
highlights.zh: 是一条成交率友好的经典线路

description.en: Start in the capital with a smooth arrival and city introduction.
description.zh: 从首都开始，以轻松抵达和城市认知开场。

description.en: Cover the most recognizable cultural icons in Beijing.
description.zh: 覆盖北京最有识别度的文化地标。

title.en: Great Wall or deeper city layer

description.en: Use one day for either iconic scenery or a more local Beijing experience.
description.zh: 这一天可用于长城，也可用于更本地的北京体验。

description.en: Shift into the ancient-capital part of the journey.
description.zh: 进入古都段落，切换行程气质。

description.en: Focus on heritage, city walls, and historical identity.
description.zh: 聚焦历史遗产、古城墙与古都身份。

description.en: Add local dining and more human-scale experiences.
description.zh: 补充本地餐饮与更有生活感的体验。

description.en: Move from ancient-capital atmosphere into modern China.
description.zh: 从古都气质切换到现代中国。

description.en: Experience skyline, riverside, lifestyle, and urban polish.
description.zh: 体验天际线、滨江、生活方式与都市精致感。

description.en: Wrap up the route and prepare for departure.
description.zh: 结束整段线路并安排返程。

title.zh: 帝国中国与现代天际线

description.en: A more polished version of the classic Beijing-Xi'an-Shanghai route, suitable for clients who want clearer contrast and stronger premium positioning.
description.zh: 对经典北京-西安-上海线路做了更精致的包装，适合想要更强对比感与更高端定位的客群。

tagline.en: A premium route built on China’s strongest historical and urban contrasts.
tagline.zh: 建立在中国最强历史与都市对比之上的高端路线。

idealFor.en: Premium first-time visitors, couples, and private guests who value a clearer travel narrative.
idealFor.zh: 高端首次来华客群、情侣和看重叙事感的私享客人。

travelStyle.en: Premium pacing, heritage density, and modern urban contrast.
travelStyle.zh: 高端节奏、文化密度与现代都市反差并存。

howToUse.en: Use it when basic classic routes feel too plain and you want a more sellable premium version.
howToUse.zh: 适合在基础经典线显得太普通时，升级成更好卖的高端版本。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn remain the best fit for comfort and pacing.
bestTime.zh: 春秋依旧是最适合平衡舒适与节奏的季节。

extensions.en: Can add Suzhou, Hangzhou, or Chengdu depending on taste and time.
extensions.zh: 可根据时间和喜好增加苏州、杭州或成都。

highlights.en: Stronger premium framing than a generic classic route
highlights.zh: 比普通经典线更有高端包装感

highlights.en: Better city contrast between imperial legacy and global skyline
highlights.zh: 帝国遗产与全球化城市反差更强

highlights.en: Useful as a flagship case for mid-to-high-end clients
highlights.zh: 适合作为中高端客户的门面案例

description.en: Start with a smoother and more premium arrival setup.
description.zh: 以更顺滑、更高端的接待方式开场。

description.en: Focus on major royal and state-level heritage symbols.
description.zh: 聚焦北京最具国家象征性的皇城文化资源。

description.en: Use one day to add a more nuanced city layer.
description.zh: 用一天补充更细腻的城市层次。

description.en: Move into the historical middle chapter of the route.
description.zh: 进入这条线路的历史中段。

description.en: Build the narrative around ancient-capital identity.
description.zh: 围绕古都身份展开叙事。

description.en: Add food, walls, museums, or a slower rhythm.
description.zh: 可灵活加入美食、城墙、博物馆或更慢节奏安排。

description.en: Shift the route into the modern-city chapter.
description.zh: 切换到现代都市段落。

description.en: Use skyline views and refined city imagery as the route’s contrast peak.
description.zh: 把天际线与都市精致感作为整条线的反差高点。

description.en: Keep space for shopping, design neighborhoods, and relaxed pacing.
description.zh: 保留购物、设计街区与轻松节奏的空间。

description.en: Complete the route and arrange departure smoothly.
description.zh: 完成整段线路并顺利返程。

description.en: A softer-paced western China city route centered on Chengdu and Chongqing, balancing food, city energy, and strong visual identity.
description.zh: 一条以成都和重庆为核心的中国西部城市路线，兼顾美食、城市活力与强视觉识别度。

tagline.en: A western China city route built on pandas, food, and dramatic urban texture.
tagline.zh: 围绕熊猫、美食与立体城市气质打造的西部城市路线。

idealFor.en: Food lovers, couples, younger travelers, and guests who want a more contemporary China story.
idealFor.zh: 美食爱好者、情侣、年轻客群以及想看更当代中国气质的客人。

travelStyle.en: Urban energy, food focus, and a softer private pace.
travelStyle.zh: 城市活力、美食主导、私享节奏偏轻松。

howToUse.en: Use it as a shorter high-interest route for guests who don’t want a heavy classic-history itinerary.
howToUse.zh: 适合不想走厚重历史线、但希望线路有趣且好卖的客群。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn usually feel the most comfortable.

extensions.en: Can be expanded into Yunnan or Xi'an depending on route goals.
extensions.zh: 可根据目标延展到云南或西安。

highlights.en: Strong food and city atmosphere
highlights.zh: 美食与城市氛围很强

highlights.en: A younger-feeling China route
highlights.zh: 更年轻化的中国路线

highlights.en: Good alternative to classic capital-based trips
highlights.zh: 是传统古都线路之外的好替代

description.en: Start with a relaxed city arrival and easy evening.
description.zh: 以轻松抵达和舒缓开场进入线路。

description.en: Focus on Chengdu’s signature softness and local identity.
description.zh: 聚焦成都的代表性柔和气质与本地身份。

description.en: Use food as the main storytelling layer of the day.
description.zh: 以美食作为当天最核心的叙事主线。

description.en: Shift into a more dramatic urban mood.
description.zh: 切换到更具冲击力的城市氛围。

title.zh: 重庆城市景观与夜生活

description.en: Highlight layered city views, hotpot, and evening atmosphere.
description.zh: 突出立体城市景观、火锅和夜间气质。

description.en: Wrap up the short western-China city route.
description.zh: 结束这条短线西部城市体验。

description.en: A varied southwest route blending food cities, mountain atmosphere, and richer regional contrast through Chengdu, Chongqing, and Yunnan.
description.zh: 通过成都、重庆、云南把美食城市、山地氛围和区域反差结合起来的西南多样化线路。

tagline.en: A richer southwest route combining city flavor and landscape texture.
tagline.zh: 把城市风味与山地风景质感结合起来的西南路线。

idealFor.en: Couples, scenery lovers, and guests looking for a more distinctive route than the standard classic line.
idealFor.zh: 情侣、风景爱好者以及想跳出标准经典线的客群。

travelStyle.en: Regional contrast, softer pacing, and a mix of food and scenery.
travelStyle.zh: 区域对比明显、节奏较柔和、美食与风景并重。

howToUse.en: Use it when clients want something more memorable and less generic than Beijing-Shanghai routes.
howToUse.zh: 当客户不想走过于常规的北京上海路线时，这条线很合适。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn usually provide the best balance.

extensions.en: Can expand further into Shangri-La or Guilin depending on route depth.
extensions.zh: 可进一步扩到香格里拉或桂林。

highlights.en: Higher route variety than standard city classics
highlights.zh: 比标准城市经典线更多样

highlights.en: Blends food, mountain atmosphere, and local culture
highlights.zh: 融合美食、山地氛围与地方文化

highlights.en: Good for couples and high-engagement travelers
highlights.zh: 适合情侣与体验感需求更强的客群

description.en: Start with a soft, food-friendly introduction.
description.zh: 以柔和且适合展开美食体验的节奏开场。

description.en: Use Chengdu as the first strong emotional anchor of the route.
description.zh: 把成都设为整条线路的第一个情绪锚点。

description.en: Move into a bolder urban visual environment.
description.zh: 进入更有冲击力的城市视觉环境。

description.en: Use terrain and nightlife as the main experience layer.
description.zh: 把地形和夜生活作为主体验层。

description.en: Shift the narrative into a more scenic and regional chapter.
description.zh: 把叙事切换到更具风景感和区域感的段落。

description.en: Use Yunnan’s softer pace to reset the route rhythm.
description.zh: 用云南更柔和的节奏重新调整整条线路的呼吸感。

description.en: Blend local culture and slower movement.
description.zh: 融合地方文化与更慢的移动节奏。

description.en: Keep room for scenery, rest, or private adjustments.
description.zh: 给风景、休息或私享调整留空间。

description.en: Close the southwest route and prepare for departure.
description.zh: 结束西南线路并安排返程。

description.en: A scenery-first private route shaped around Xinjiang’s vast scale, Silk Road atmosphere, and longer-form travel logic.
description.zh: 一条围绕新疆大尺度风景、丝路氛围和长线旅行逻辑打造的风景优先型私享路线。

tagline.en: A private Xinjiang route built for scale, scenery, and Silk Road mood.
tagline.zh: 围绕尺度感、风景和丝路氛围打造的新疆私享路线。

idealFor.en: Scenery-focused travelers, photographers, and private guests comfortable with longer routing days.
idealFor.zh: 风景优先型游客、摄影客群与能接受长线行程的私享客户。

travelStyle.en: Long-form scenic travel with strong road-route identity.
travelStyle.zh: 以公路与景观为核心的长线风景旅行。

howToUse.en: Use this as a flagship scenery case for western-China custom travel.
howToUse.zh: 可作为中国西部高端定制里的风景旗舰案例。

bestTime.en: The best season depends on the exact Xinjiang region and landscape goal.
bestTime.zh: 最佳季节取决于具体新疆区域和景观目标。

extensions.en: Can split into North Xinjiang, Ili, Kashgar, or a softer private scenic version.
extensions.zh: 可拆成北疆、伊犁、喀什或更柔和的私享风景版。

highlights.en: Strong visual scale and route narrative
highlights.zh: 尺度感和线路叙事都很强

highlights.en: Excellent fit for high-value scenic clients
highlights.zh: 很适合高价值风景型客户

highlights.en: More distinctive than generic China city tours
highlights.zh: 比普通中国城市团更有差异化

description.en: Use the first day to transition gently into the region.
description.zh: 第一天以适应区域节奏为主。

description.en: Start opening the route into a broader landscape frame.
description.zh: 开始把线路拉进更大的景观框架。

description.en: Focus on the most visually powerful route segment.
description.zh: 聚焦整条线里最强视觉段落。

description.en: Let the travel rhythm itself become part of the experience.
description.zh: 让旅行节奏本身成为体验的一部分。

description.en: Blend nature with cultural atmosphere and frontier identity.
description.zh: 把自然景观与丝路文化和边疆氛围结合起来。

description.en: Leave space for visual timing and private adjustments.
description.zh: 给摄影时机和私享调整留出空间。

description.en: Continue into the route’s more immersive section.
description.zh: 进入更沉浸的风景段落。

description.en: Begin easing out from the most intense scenic segment.
description.zh: 从最强风景段逐步收束。

description.en: Shift back toward departure logistics while keeping the experience smooth.
description.zh: 在保持体验顺滑的前提下转回返程逻辑。

description.en: Complete the Xinjiang route and depart.
description.zh: 完成新疆线路并返程。

description.en: A flexible Yunnan route combining old towns, mountain atmosphere, softer pacing, and cultural variety.
description.zh: 一条兼具古镇、山地氛围、柔和节奏与文化多样性的云南路线。

tagline.en: A softer scenic route built on old towns, mountains, and cultural depth.
tagline.zh: 围绕古镇、山地与文化深度打造的柔和风景路线。

idealFor.en: Couples, nature lovers, and travelers looking for a richer regional experience.
idealFor.zh: 情侣、自然爱好者和想要区域型深度体验的旅行者。

travelStyle.en: Scenic, flexible, and emotionally softer than classic city itineraries.
travelStyle.zh: 比经典城市线更有风景感、灵活度和情绪柔和度。

howToUse.en: Use it for clients who want variety without the hard edges of a fast-paced city route.
howToUse.zh: 适合想要丰富性，但不想要强节奏城市线压迫感的客户。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are usually the easiest seasons for Yunnan routes.
bestTime.zh: 春秋通常是云南线路最稳的季节。

extensions.en: Can extend to Shangri-La or blend with Chengdu depending on style.
extensions.zh: 可延展到香格里拉，或与成都组合。

highlights.en: High scenic and emotional comfort value
highlights.zh: 风景和情绪舒适度都高

highlights.en: More varied than a pure city itinerary
highlights.zh: 比纯城市线路更有多样性

highlights.en: Very suitable for couple-focused selling
highlights.zh: 很适合情侣向成交

description.en: Use the first day to enter the route gently.
description.zh: 以轻柔方式进入整条路线。

description.en: Build emotional tone through slower and more visual environments.
description.zh: 通过更慢、更有画面感的环境建立情绪基调。

description.en: Add cultural detail and regional flavor.
description.zh: 加入地方文化细节与区域气质。

description.en: Let natural scenery become the day’s anchor.
description.zh: 让自然风景成为当天主线。

description.en: Keep the route soft and adjustable.
description.zh: 保持线路的柔和与可调整性。

description.en: Go slightly deeper into local identity.
description.zh: 更深入一点地进入地方身份感。

description.en: Leave time for slower pacing or premium extras.
description.zh: 留出慢节奏或高端附加体验空间。

description.en: Close the Yunnan route and depart.
description.zh: 结束云南线路并返程。

description.en: A compact scenic route built around Guilin and Zhangjiajie for clients who want China’s most iconic nature visuals in one trip.
description.zh: 围绕桂林和张家界打造的紧凑型风景路线，适合想在一次旅行中看中国代表性自然景观的客群。

tagline.en: A compact route for clients who want China’s strongest nature visuals fast.
tagline.zh: 适合想快速看中国高识别度自然景观的紧凑型路线。

idealFor.en: Scenery lovers, photographers, and clients with limited time.
idealFor.zh: 风景爱好者、摄影客群以及时间有限的客户。

travelStyle.zh: 风景主导、视觉优先、亮点目的地驱动。

howToUse.en: Use it as a shorter scenic alternative to longer western-China routes.
howToUse.zh: 可作为长线西部风景路线之外的短版替代。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are usually the easiest seasons for comfort and visibility.
bestTime.zh: 春秋通常最适合舒适度和观景体验。

extensions.en: Can extend with Shanghai or Chengdu depending on route balance.
extensions.zh: 可根据平衡感延展到上海或成都。

highlights.en: High visual payoff in a shorter time window
highlights.zh: 较短时间里视觉回报很高

highlights.en: Excellent fit for photo-driven marketing
highlights.zh: 很适合做摄影感营销

highlights.en: A good nature-focused contrast to city-heavy China routes
highlights.zh: 是城市型中国线路之外的自然补充

description.en: Begin with easy entry into a scenery-first route.
description.zh: 以轻松方式进入风景优先型路线。

description.en: Use Guilin’s iconic visual language as the first highlight.
description.zh: 用桂林的山水语言作为第一高点。

description.en: Move the route toward a more dramatic natural chapter.
description.zh: 把线路推进到更具冲击力的自然段落。

description.en: Focus on the most cinematic natural visuals.
description.zh: 聚焦最具电影感的自然画面。

description.en: Keep room for weather, photography timing, or slower travel.
description.zh: 留给天气、摄影时机或更慢节奏使用。

description.en: Finish the scenic route and depart.
description.zh: 结束风景线路并返程。

title.en: China Luxury City and Nature Contrast
title.zh: 中国轻奢城市与自然反差之旅

description.en: A route designed around premium contrast: polished modern city life paired with highly visual nature destinations.
description.zh: 围绕轻奢反差感设计的线路：把精致现代城市生活与高视觉冲击自然目的地放在同一条线里。

tagline.en: A premium contrast route between urban polish and scenic spectacle.
tagline.zh: 把都市精致感与自然奇观并置的轻奢反差路线。

idealFor.en: Couples, premium clients, and guests who want stronger visual and emotional contrast.
idealFor.zh: 情侣、高端客群以及想要更强视觉和情绪对比的客户。

travelStyle.en: Premium pacing, modern comfort, and contrast-led route design.
travelStyle.zh: 高端节奏、现代舒适与反差驱动的线路设计。

howToUse.en: Use it as a more premium alternative to pure city routes or pure nature routes.
howToUse.zh: 可作为纯城市线或纯自然线之外更高级的替代。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn usually make the contrast easiest to enjoy.
bestTime.zh: 春秋通常最适合享受这条线路的反差感。

extensions.en: Can lean more city-heavy or nature-heavy based on client profile.
extensions.zh: 可根据客户画像调整成偏城市或偏自然版本。

highlights.en: Visually stronger than a standard city tour
highlights.zh: 比标准城市团更有视觉张力

highlights.en: Useful for premium positioning and couple-focused selling
highlights.zh: 适合高端定位和情侣向成交

highlights.en: Balances comfort with dramatic route contrast
highlights.zh: 在舒适度和反差感之间平衡得好

title.en: Arrival in a modern city base

description.en: Open with polish, convenience, and a premium first impression.
description.zh: 以精致、便利和高端第一印象开场。

description.en: Use urban refinement to establish the route’s first emotional tone.
description.zh: 用都市精致感建立路线的第一段情绪。

description.en: Shift gradually from city polish into scenery-led travel.
description.zh: 从城市精致感逐步转入风景型旅行。

description.en: Let the strongest scenic experience become the route’s contrast peak.
description.zh: 让最强风景体验成为整条线的反差高点。

description.en: Leave room for slower pacing or high-end extras.
description.zh: 留给慢节奏或高端附加体验。

description.en: Ease the route back toward departure logic.
description.zh: 把线路缓和地转回返程逻辑。

description.en: End with comfort and one last premium city layer.
description.zh: 用舒适和最后一层都市精致感来收尾。

description.en: Complete the premium contrast journey.
description.zh: 结束这条轻奢反差线路。

description.en: A broad premium China journey linking multiple representative cities into one flagship route suitable for showcasing nationwide capability.
description.zh: 一条把多座代表性城市串成一体的高端中国路线，适合作为展示全国服务能力的旗舰型案例。

tagline.en: A flagship multi-city China route designed as a signature premium case.
tagline.zh: 一条可作为品牌门面案例的中国多城旗舰线路。

idealFor.en: Premium private guests, longer-stay travelers, groups, and business-hosting scenarios.
idealFor.zh: 高端私享客群、长停留旅客、团队与商务接待场景。

travelStyle.en: Flagship, panoramic, premium, and highly adaptable.
travelStyle.zh: 旗舰型、全景式、高端且高度可调整。

howToUse.en: Use it as the brand’s strongest nationwide showcase route.
howToUse.zh: 可作为品牌最强的全国能力展示线路。

bestTime.en: The exact timing depends on which cities are prioritized, but spring and autumn are the safest defaults.
bestTime.zh: 具体时间取决于重点城市组合，但春秋通常是最稳妥的默认选择。

extensions.en: Can expand or shrink by city cluster, season, and client goals.
extensions.zh: 可按城市组团、季节和客户目标灵活放大或缩短。

highlights.en: Best flagship route for showing national coverage
highlights.zh: 最适合展示全国覆盖能力

highlights.en: High flexibility for groups, private clients, or hosted guests
highlights.zh: 对团队、私享和接待型客户都很灵活

highlights.en: Useful as a premium brand-signature product
highlights.zh: 很适合作为品牌签名型产品

description.en: Begin with a premium arrival and overall route framing.
description.zh: 以高端接待和整条线路说明作为开场。

description.en: Start from a strong symbolic and cultural city.
description.zh: 从文化与象征性都最强的城市切入。

description.en: Add more historical or imperial density.
description.zh: 增加更多历史或帝国纵深。

description.en: Move into a more contemporary and international city atmosphere.
description.zh: 进入更现代、更国际化的都市氛围。

title.zh: 都市天际线与生活方式

description.en: Highlight polished modern-city imagery.
description.zh: 突出精致现代城市形象。

description.en: Move the story toward a different China region.
description.zh: 把故事推进到另一个中国区域。

description.en: Use local rhythm and dining to deepen the route.
description.zh: 用地方节奏与饮食深化线路。

description.en: Bring in broader landscape or stronger regional differentiation.
description.zh: 引入更大的景观或更强的区域差异。

description.en: Allow time for deeper, client-shaped experiences.
description.zh: 为更深度、更贴合客户的体验留空间。

description.en: Keep room for customization and rest.
description.zh: 给个性化和休息留空间。

description.en: Begin easing out of the multi-city rhythm.
description.zh: 开始从多城节奏中缓慢收束。

description.en: Complete the flagship China journey and depart.
description.zh: 完成这条中国旗舰线路并返程。
